key_clauses.obligation: Secure site within 12 months; franchisor must accept lease
Build to specs; open within 16 months; franchisor approval before opening
Non-exclusive license to use marks during term only
Absolute confidentiality; locked in safe; innovations are franchisor's property
No competitive business (>50% sandwich revenue) anywhere during term
Full compliance with Brand Standards; supplier restrictions; customer complaint resolution
Fund (4.5%), local (0.5%), cooperative (up to 2%); franchisor controls all programs
Weekly sales reports; annual P&L and balance sheet; franchisor access to all data
Franchisor may inspect at any time with or without notice; audit rights
No transfer without prior consent; comprehensive conditions; ROFR within 60 days
One successor franchise on then-current (materially different) terms; $10K fee; remodel to current standards
Extensive curable and non-curable defaults; cross-default; repeated defaults even if cured
De-identification; assign phone numbers; return confidential info; noncompete 2 years; liquidated damages; franchisor purchase option at FMV
Franchisee indemnifies franchisor for all claims from restaurant operation
Georgia law; Atlanta forum; no waiver; force majeure (except payments); no withholding; costs and fees; cumulative rights
All owners personally guarantee all FA obligations including noncompete

exhibits_walked.deferred_pages: None — all key operative sections reviewed via targeted page reads

exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Specific scope of principal agreement obligations (e.g., whether it covers spousal obligations)
